cases.given: every root is a pure source and every derivative is produced inside the same product graph
a product step consumes an output created by investigation or PoC
a product step consumes a file preprocessed outside the registered product graph
a product step consumes an artifact with neither a pure-source declaration nor a producer
two product steps claim the same output artifact
product steps depend on each other's outputs in a cycle
a registered product step does not contribute to any declared final artifact
